steps.title: Apply the percent increase formula
steps.content:
The percent increase formula is:
$$\text{Percent Increase} = \frac{\text{New Value} - \text{Old Value}}{\text{Old Value}} \times 100\%$$
The album started with 8 postcards (old value) and increased to 72 postcards (new value).

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute the values into the formula:
$$\text{Percent Increase} = \frac{72 - 8}{8} \times 100\%$$
$$= \frac{64}{8} \times 100\%$$
$$= 8 \times 100\%$$
$$= 800\%$$
Therefore, D is correct.
